# Palettly — Free Design & Developer Tools

> Free browser-based tools for designers and developers. Extract color palettes, generate CSS gradients, convert units, compress images and more. No sign-up needed.

## Palettly
[Palettly](https://palettly.xyz/index.html)

## Color palette extractor Upload any image and extract a beautiful color palette. Export as HEX, CSS, Figma tokens or Tailwind config. Most popular
[Color palette extractor Upload any image and extract a beautiful color palette. Export as HEX, CSS, Figma tokens or Tailwind config. Most popular](https://palettly.xyz/palette.html)

## CSS gradient generator Create linear, radial and conic gradients visually. Copy the CSS code ready to paste into your project.
[CSS gradient generator Create linear, radial and conic gradients visually. Copy the CSS code ready to paste into your project.](https://palettly.xyz/gradient.html)

## Color format converter Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSB and CSS color names instantly. Live preview included.
[Color format converter Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSB and CSS color names instantly. Live preview included.](https://palettly.xyz/color-convert.html)

## Palette from base color Pick a base color and generate complementary, analogous, triadic or monochromatic palettes automatically.
[Palette from base color Pick a base color and generate complementary, analogous, triadic or monochromatic palettes automatically.](https://palettly.xyz/palette-generator.html)

## Unit converter Convert px ↔ rem ↔ em ↔ vh ↔ vw instantly. Set your base font size and get all values at once.
[Unit converter Convert px ↔ rem ↔ em ↔ vh ↔ vw instantly. Set your base font size and get all values at once.](https://palettly.xyz/units.html)

## Image compressor Compress JPG and PNG images directly in your browser. Adjust quality and download the result instantly.
[Image compressor Compress JPG and PNG images directly in your browser. Adjust quality and download the result instantly.](https://palettly.xyz/compress.html)

## Google Fonts picker Browse, preview and compare Google Fonts with your own text. Get the embed code ready to copy.
[Google Fonts picker Browse, preview and compare Google Fonts with your own text. Get the embed code ready to copy.](https://palettly.xyz/fonts.html)

## Mood palette generator Not inspired? Pick mood keywords — warm, dark, minimal, retro — and get a matching color palette instantly. New
[Mood palette generator Not inspired? Pick mood keywords — warm, dark, minimal, retro — and get a matching color palette instantly. New](https://palettly.xyz/mood.html)

## Image color picker Upload any image and use the precision eyedropper to pick exact colors. Get HEX, RGB and HSL instantly. New
[Image color picker Upload any image and use the precision eyedropper to pick exact colors. Get HEX, RGB and HSL instantly. New](https://palettly.xyz/picker.html)

## Image format converter Convert between SVG, PNG, JPG and WEBP instantly. Auto-detects format, custom output size, quality control. New
[Image format converter Convert between SVG, PNG, JPG and WEBP instantly. Auto-detects format, custom output size, quality control. New](https://palettly.xyz/convert.html)

## Spreadsheet converter Convert between CSV, XLSX, JSON and TSV instantly. Preview your data before downloading. New
[Spreadsheet converter Convert between CSV, XLSX, JSON and TSV instantly. Preview your data before downloading. New](https://palettly.xyz/spreadsheet.html)

## PDF to DOCX converter Convert PDF files to editable Word documents. Text and basic formatting preserved. Works best with simple PDFs. New
[PDF to DOCX converter Convert PDF files to editable Word documents. Text and basic formatting preserved. Works best with simple PDFs. New](https://palettly.xyz/pdf-to-docx.html)

## Palettly Canvas Draw, add shapes and text. Export your canvas as PNG plus a design kit with your color palette and fonts used. New
[Palettly Canvas Draw, add shapes and text. Export your canvas as PNG plus a design kit with your color palette and fonts used. New](https://palettly.xyz/canvas.html)
